subcodes.title: Words to students of Beirut university, spoken on 1914-08-31
subcodes.first_line: This is a delightful gathering. It is very spiritual and is well-organized and orderly. Many gatherings are held in the world
subcodes.first_line_orig: خوب مجلسی است بسیار محفل روحانی است مجلسی است مرتب و منظم در اینعالم مجمعهای
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @unity of thought and belief, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
